project.create: INSERT INTO projects (owner_id, name, description) VALUES ($1, $2, $3) RETURNING id, owner_id, name, description, created_at, updated_at;
project.getAccess: SELECT p.owner_id, pm.role FROM projects p LEFT JOIN project_members pm ON pm.project_id = p.id AND pm.user_id = $2 WHERE p.id = $1;
project.getByIdForUser: SELECT p.id, p.owner_id, p.name, p.description, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM projects p LEFT JOIN project_members pm ON pm.project_id = p.id AND pm.user_id = $2 WHERE p.id = $1 AND (p.owner_id = $2 OR pm.user_id IS NOT NULL) LIMIT 1;
project.listForUser: SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.owner_id, p.name, p.description, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM projects p LEFT JOIN project_members pm ON pm.project_id = p.id WHERE p.owner_id = $1 OR pm.user_id = $1 ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT $2 OFFSET $3;
project.countForUser: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.id)::int AS total FROM projects p LEFT JOIN project_members pm ON pm.project_id = p.id WHERE p.owner_id = $1 OR pm.user_id = $1;
project.update: UPDATE projects SET name = COALESCE($2, name), description = COALESCE($3, description) WHERE id = $1 RETURNING id, owner_id, name, description, created_at, updated_at;
member.add: INSERT INTO project_members (project_id, user_id, role) VALUES ($1, $2, $3) ON CONFLICT (project_id, user_id) DO NOTHING RETURNING id, project_id, user_id, role, created_at;
member.list: SELECT id, project_id, user_id, role, created_at FROM project_members WHERE project_id = $1 ORDER BY created_at ASC;
member.updateRole: UPDATE project_members SET role = $3 WHERE project_id = $1 AND user_id = $2 RETURNING id, project_id, user_id, role, created_at;
member.remove: DELETE FROM project_members WHERE project_id = $1 AND user_id = $2;
